step_rationale: Post-AMI heart-failure prediction biomarker; cytoskeletal protein; regulates cardiomyocyte mechanical stability.
mechanism: ADD3 maintains cardiomyocyte sarcomeric integrity and contractility, with expression changes predicting post-infarction ventricular remodeling.

references.title: Identification of monocyte-associated genes as predictive biomarkers of heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
